title: angelica californica
intro: Angelica californica, also known as California angelica, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant's roots, stems, and leaves possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Angelica californica include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Angelica californica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
